texto: I've always been intellectually restless, but it is the building part of it that most interests me. It is the constructing of the team that is my favorite part. Anyone who is familiar with the history of the A's franchise, even dating back to Philadelphia, knows that every five or 10 years, you have to tear it apart and rebuild it.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Billy Beane sobre temas ligados a lideranca. A afirmação “I've always been intellectually restless, but it is the building part of it that most interests m…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a lideranca, history, team, útil em momentos de team e me.

texto: The idea that you can create a template that will work forever doesn't happen in any business. There's some really, really bright people in this business. You can't do the same thing the same way and be successful for a long period of time.
explicacao: Citação de Billy Beane sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “The idea that you can create a template that will work forever doesn't happen in any business. Th…” articula sucesso, work, time em registro de sucesso, com relevância para contextos como trabalho e time.

texto: We try to create a situation where we're the casino. It's like how an actuary would set insurance rates. Predictability, predictability, predictability. What's the path to least risk? What's the greater chance of getting some return on this asset?
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Billy Beane: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “We try to create a situation where we're the casino. It's like how an actuary would set insurance…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, path, risk pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de risk e insurance.
